hook_type: Personal address + specific community number + recursion in one sentence
tactic: 'You are one of N who built this' -> 'now we are raising on it' recursion
primary_text:
You are one of 137,000 investors who built this platform. Now we are raising on it.

324 raises. $234M+. Every dollar came from retail investors choosing to own a piece of something they believed in.

Now we are doing the same.

Save your spot. You will see the offer the moment it goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: After 324 raises on Birchal, our turn
description: Save your spot. You will see the offer the moment it goes live.
_source_label: DRC V3 -- B1 Community-as-builder / Recursion (existing investors)
_v3_changes: Hook rewrite: 'You've backed a company on our platform. Now you can back the company that runs it.' -> 'You are one of 137,000 investors who built this platform. Now we are raising on it.' Specific number (137,000) in opener; 'built this platform' is FMTH-validated ownership-framing. Halbert 3->5.
Headline retouched: 'The platform you built is opening up' -> 'After 324 raises on Birchal, our turn' (sequential, specific, first-person).
_drc_playbook: 11 Lifecycle Email Promo / Launch (B2C considered, most-aware, active list)
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors who have made at least one investment on the platform.
_a_pile_signals: recursion (now we are raising on it)
_compliance_findings_resolved: PREOFFER-VERBS: 'save your spot', 'see the offer'. No transaction verbs.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'you will see the offer the moment it goes live'.
Anti-preferential terms (s 738G): waitlist remains free and equal-access.
